mapper.select: SELECT ta.id AS ta_id, ta.name_en AS ta_name, d.id AS disease_id, COALESCE(d.name_en, d.name_cn) AS disease_name FROM therapeutic_area ta JOIN disease d ON d.ta_id = ta.id ORDER BY ta.sort_order, ta.name_en, d.name_en
SELECT COALESCE(name_en, name_cn) FROM disease WHERE id = #{diseaseId}
